---
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 4
    theme: cosmo
    css: ../styles.scss
    smooth-scroll: true
    df-print: paged  # Required only for R-based data frames
---

## Coauthors in alphabetical order

The following table includes the coauthors of ongoing and finished projects. *Indicates undergraduate RA coauthors.*

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
library(readr)

coauthors <- read_csv("coauthors.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  arrange(Name)
```

**Total coauthors:** `r nrow(coauthors)`

```{r}
kable(coauthors, format = "pipe")
```
